title: RSW Christmas Crackers DIY Kit – 6 Recyclable 13.5" Crackers in 2 Festive Designs with Hats, Ribbons, Name Tags & Mottos – Fill Your Own Personalised Party Crackers
features: ECO-FRIENDLY CHRISTMAS CRACKERS – Pack of 6 recyclable crackers made with sustainable packaging, perfect for eco-conscious festive celebrations
MAKE YOUR OWN KIT – Includes everything needed to assemble 6 crackers: ribbon ties, mottos, paper hats and name tags for personalisation
FILL WITH YOUR OWN GIFTS – Each cracker measures 13.5" when made up, leaving plenty of room for small gifts, sweets, or thoughtful surprises
TWO ELEGANT DESIGNS – Features 2 stylish festive patterns in gold and white with seasonal foliage prints, ideal for Christmas table décor
description: Bring a touch of creativity and festive charm to your Christmas celebrations with this Make Your Own Christmas Crackers kit. Perfect for adding a personal touch to your seasonal table décor, this set includes everything you need to create six beautiful crackers in two elegant designs. Each cracker measures 13.5" when assembled, providing the perfect size for slipping in your own small gifts, sweets, or thoughtful surprises. The set comes complete with ribbon ties, hats, mottos, and name tags for easy personalisation, allowing you to design unique crackers for each guest. Whether you’re hosting a family Christmas dinner, a festive party with friends, or simply want to add a traditional touch to your seasonal celebrations, these crackers offer both fun and practicality. Made with recyclable materials, these eco-friendly crackers are a sustainable choice that doesn’t compromise on style. The classic festive designs, featuring gold and white tones with seasonal foliage prints, make them an elegant addition to any Christmas table setting. Ideal for families, craft lovers, or anyone who enjoys adding a personal element to Christmas traditions, this cracker kit brings joy from the moment of creation through to the fun of pulling them open. Add a little magic to your holiday season and create lasting memories with crackers that are truly your own.

specifications_table.Included Components: Ribbon ties, mottos, snaps, hats, 6 Name Tags, 6 crackers in 2 designs
